about.intro: I am Furqan Ahmad Bhat from Baramulla, pursuing a Bachelor's in Data Science and Physics.
about.approach: I build real-world intelligent systems using AI, IoT, and data-driven approaches.
about.focus: My focus is on solving practical problems with scalable, efficient, and intelligent systems.

projects.title: Apple Grading System
projects.description: An intelligent grading system using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to classify apples based on color, size, and defects. Designed to automate agricultural sorting and improve accuracy and efficiency.
projects.problem: Manual grading of apples is inconsistent, slow, and labor-intensive.
projects.solution: Developed a CNN-based system that processes images and classifies apples automatically.
projects.impact: Reduces human effort, increases accuracy, and enables scalable agricultural automation.

projects.title: Tiwzz
projects.description: A startup focused on connecting rural restaurants with nearby customers within a 10–15 km radius. Designed to improve accessibility and increase income for small businesses.
projects.problem: Rural restaurants lack customer reach and digital presence.
projects.solution: Built a hyperlocal delivery platform connecting restaurants and nearby users.
projects.impact: Boosts local economy and provides food access to remote users.

projects.title: IoT Health Monitoring Device
projects.description: An IoT-based system that predicts urination timing using sensor data and alerts caregivers in advance, helping patients with limited mobility.
projects.problem: Patients depend heavily on caregivers for basic needs.
projects.solution: Developed a predictive system using sensor data and pattern recognition.
projects.impact: Improves patient dignity and reduces caregiver workload.
